metadata.website_type: construction and engineering services company website

tasks.name: Request a quote for a 3-story office building with the shortest timeline under 12 months
tasks.description: Navigate to commercial building services, open the 3–5 story office service, and submit a quote request for a 3-story office in Denver with a $2,000,000 budget, selecting the shortest available completion timeline that is 12 months or less.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Services" option in the top navigation bar.
Select "Commercial Buildings" from the Services dropdown menu.
On the Commercial Buildings page, click the service card labeled "3–5 Story Office Buildings".
On the service detail page, click the primary button labeled "Request a Quote".
In the quote form, type "3-story office building" into the "Project Name" field and "Denver, CO" into the "Project Location" field.
In the "Estimated Budget (USD)" field, enter "2000000" and in the "Number of Floors" dropdown select "3".
Open the "Desired Completion Timeline" dropdown and select the shortest listed option that is 12 months or less (for example, "9–12 months" if it appears).
In the contact section of the form, enter "Jordan Smith" as Full Name, "jordan.smith@example.com" as Email, and "3035550182" as Phone Number.
Click the button labeled "Submit Quote Request" at the bottom of the form.

tasks.name: Find and add to comparison a large hospital project case study in Texas after 2020
tasks.description: Locate a healthcare case study in Texas with a budget of at least $50M completed in 2021 or later, using filters and sorting by most recent completion date, then add that project to the comparison list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Projects" or "Case Studies" link in the top navigation bar.
On the case studies page, use the "Sector" filter to select "Healthcare".
Use the location filter or dropdown to select "Texas" as the project location.
In the "Completion Year" filter, set the minimum year to "2021".
In the "Budget" filter or slider, set the minimum budget value to "50000000" (50,000,000 USD).
Use the sort dropdown above the results to select "Completion Date - Newest First".
Click on the first project card in the filtered and sorted results list.
On the project detail page, click the button labeled "Add to Comparison" to add this hospital project to the comparison list.

tasks.name: Schedule a warehouse site visit at the nearest branch within 50 km
tasks.description: Use the branch locator to find the nearest branch to ZIP code 94107 within 50 km, then schedule a warehouse/industrial site visit at that branch for August 15, 2026 in the earliest available morning slot before 11:00 AM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Locations" link in the top navigation bar.
On the Locations page, type "94107" into the ZIP or Postal Code search field and click the "Find Branches" button.
In the sort dropdown for the branch results, select "Distance - Nearest First".
In the results list, click the first branch card that shows a distance value of "50 km" or less.
On the selected branch detail page, click the button labeled "Schedule Site Visit".
On the booking form, select "Warehouse / Industrial" from the "Project Type" dropdown.
Use the date picker to select "August 15, 2026" as the preferred site visit date.
From the list of available time slots, choose the earliest time that is before 11:00 AM (for example, select "9:00 AM" if it is listed).

In the contact section, enter "100 Industrial St, San Francisco, CA" as the Project Address, and fill in your details as "Riley Chen" for Name, "riley.chen@example.com" for Email, and "4155550199" for Phone, then click the "Confirm Appointment" button.

tasks.name: Rent an excavator and concrete mixer for 5 days under specific constraints
tasks.description: Use the equipment rental section to rent one excavator (at least 18 tons) and one concrete mixer (capacity 5+ cu ft, 4+ star rating) for June 1–5, 2026, selecting the cheapest excavator under a $700 daily rate and adding standard damage waiver insurance for both items before proceeding to the rental summary.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Equipment Rental" option in the top navigation bar.
On the Equipment Rental page, use the category sidebar to click on "Earthmoving".
In the filters panel, type "excavator" into the equipment search field and set the "Minimum Operating Weight" slider or field to "18" tons.
In the price filter, set the "Maximum Daily Rate" field or slider to "700".
Use the sort dropdown above the results to select "Price - Low to High" and then click the first excavator result in the list.
On the excavator detail page, select the rental start date "June 1, 2026" and the end date "June 5, 2026", check the box for "Standard Damage Waiver Insurance", and click the "Add to Cart" button.
Use the breadcrumb navigation or top menu to return to the "Equipment Rental" page and in the category sidebar click on "Concrete Equipment".

In the filters, set "Equipment Type" to "Concrete Mixer", set the "Minimum Capacity" field to "5" cu ft, set the "Customer Rating" filter to "4 stars & up", and then click the first result in the filtered list.

On the concrete mixer detail page, choose the same rental dates "June 1, 2026" to "June 5, 2026", check the "Standard Damage Waiver Insurance" option, click "Add to Cart", then click the cart icon in the header and on the cart page click the "Proceed to Rental Summary" button.

tasks.name: Select an industrial maintenance plan with fast response under $1,500/month
tasks.description: From the maintenance programs, filter for industrial facilities with emergency response time up to 2 hours and a maximum monthly fee of $1,500, sort by the longest warranty, and add the top plan to a quote request.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Services" item in the top navigation bar and select "Maintenance Programs" from the dropdown menu.
On the Maintenance Programs page, open the "Facility Type" filter and select "Industrial".
In the "Emergency Response Time" filter, select the option labeled "Up to 2 hours".
In the price or "Monthly Fee" filter, set the maximum monthly amount to "1500".
Use the sort dropdown above the plans list to select "Warranty Length - Longest First".
Scroll to the plans list and click on the first maintenance plan card displayed after applying the filters and sorting.
On the selected maintenance plan detail page, click the button labeled "Add Plan to Quote".
In the quote form or popup, enter "Taylor Lee" as Name, "taylor.lee@example.com" as Email, select "Existing facility" from the "Facility Status" dropdown, and click the "Submit for Quote" button.

tasks.name: Register for the cheapest 2+ day construction safety course starting in April 2026
tasks.description: Search for construction safety training, filter sessions to start in April 2026 with durations of 2 days or longer, sort by price, select the cheapest option, and complete registration for one participant.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Training & Certifications" link in the top navigation bar.
On the Training page, type "Construction Safety" into the search bar and click the search icon or "Search" button.
In the filters panel, set the "Start Date" range so that it includes courses starting in "April 2026".
In the "Duration" filter, select the option for "2 days or longer".
In the "Category" or "Discipline" filter, check the option labeled "Safety & Compliance".
Use the sort dropdown above the training results to select "Price - Low to High".
Click the first course result in the sorted list that meets the filters.
On the course detail page, enter "1" in the "Number of Participants" field and select the first available session date in "April 2026" from the "Session Date" dropdown.

Click the button labeled "Register Now" and on the registration form page enter "Alex Morgan" as Participant Name and "alex.morgan@example.com" as Email, then click the "Complete Registration" button.

tasks.name: Generate and send a cost estimate for a 10,000 sq ft warehouse renovation in Chicago
tasks.description: Use the online cost calculator to estimate the cost of a 10,000 sq ft warehouse renovation in Chicago with high-efficiency HVAC and a target energy savings of at least 15%, then send the estimate through the built-in quote form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Resources" menu in the top navigation and select "Cost Calculator" from the dropdown.
On the calculator page, open the "Project Type" dropdown and select "Warehouse Renovation".
In the "Location" field, type "Chicago, IL" and select the matching suggestion if a list appears.
In the "Floor Area (sq ft)" field, enter "10000".
Open the "HVAC Efficiency Level" dropdown and select "High Efficiency".
In the "Target Energy Savings" slider or input field, set the value to "15" percent or higher.
Click the button labeled "Calculate Estimate" to generate the project cost estimate.
Below the displayed estimate, click the action button labeled either "Email This Estimate" or "Request Detailed Quote" (choose whichever is available).

In the form that opens, enter "Morgan Ellis" as Name, "morgan.ellis@example.com" as Email, select "Warehouse / Industrial" from the "Facility Type" dropdown, and click the "Send Estimate Request" button.

tasks.name: Submit a design-build inquiry for a mid-sized retail store with specific budget and contact preferences
tasks.description: Use the contact page to submit a design-build inquiry for an 8,000 sq ft retail store with a budget range of $500,000–$800,000, a project start date in October 2026, indicating that you heard about the company via an online search and prefer phone contact between 2–4 PM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Contact" link in the top navigation bar.
On the Contact page, select the inquiry type option or tab labeled "Design-Build Project".
In the "Project Type" dropdown, choose "Retail Store".
In the "Project Size (sq ft)" field, enter "8000" and in the "Budget Range (USD)" dropdown, select the range that includes "$500,000–$800,000".
Use the project start date picker to select a date in "October 2026" (for example, choose "October 10, 2026").
In the "How did you hear about us?" dropdown, select "Online Search".
In the "Preferred Contact Method" section, select "Phone" and in the "Preferred Time Window" dropdown choose "2 PM – 4 PM".
In the contact information fields, enter "Jamie Rivera" as Full Name, "jamie.rivera@example.com" as Email, and "5559870143" as Phone Number, then click the button labeled "Submit Inquiry".

entities.name: Service
entities.description: High-level services offered (e.g., 3–5 Story Office Buildings, Maintenance Programs).

entities.name: ServiceTimelineOption
entities.description: Predefined completion timeline options per service (e.g., 6–9 months, 9–12 months).

entities.name: ServiceQuoteRequest
entities.description: Quote requests submitted from service detail pages (e.g., 3–5 Story Office Buildings).

entities.name: ProjectCaseStudy
entities.description: Completed projects and case studies used in the Projects & Case Studies section.

entities.name: ProjectComparisonList
entities.description: List of projects added for comparison in the current session.

entities.name: Branch
entities.description: Company branches and offices used in the Locations & Branch Finder.

entities.name: BranchTimeSlot
entities.description: Bookable site visit time slots per branch.

fields.name: is_morning_slot
fields.description: True if the slot starts before 12:00 PM.

entities.name: SiteVisitAppointment
entities.description: Scheduled site visit appointments for branches.

fields.name: preferred_date
fields.description: Date selected by the user; time may be 00:00.

entities.name: EquipmentCategory
entities.description: Categories in the equipment rental catalog sidebar (e.g., Earthmoving, Concrete Equipment).

entities.name: EquipmentItem
entities.description: Individual equipment items available for rental (e.g., excavators, concrete mixers).

fields.name: operating_weight_tons
fields.description: Used for filters like minimum operating weight >= 18 tons.

fields.name: capacity_cu_ft
fields.description: Used for concrete mixer capacity filters.

entities.name: RentalExtra
entities.description: Optional extras for equipment rentals (e.g., Standard Damage Waiver Insurance).

fields.name: applicable_equipment_types
fields.description: List of equipment_type codes this extra applies to.

entities.name: RentalCart
entities.description: Rental cart summarizing selected equipment before checkout.

fields.name: items
fields.description: Array of RentalCartItem IDs or embedded items.

entities.name: RentalCartItem
entities.description: Line items within a rental cart for each equipment rental configuration.

entities.name: RentalOrder
entities.description: Finalized rental summary/confirmation submitted to the company.

entities.name: MaintenanceProgram
entities.description: Facility maintenance plans with filters for facility type, response time, and monthly fee.

entities.name: MaintenanceQuoteRequest
entities.description: Quote requests initiated from Maintenance Program detail views.

entities.name: TrainingCourse
entities.description: Training & certification courses (e.g., Construction Safety).

entities.name: TrainingSession
entities.description: Scheduled sessions for specific training courses with dates and prices.

fields.name: price_per_participant
fields.description: Overrides course base price if set.

entities.name: CourseRegistration
entities.description: Registrations for specific course sessions.

entities.name: CostEstimate
entities.description: Project cost estimates generated by the online cost calculator.

entities.name: EstimateRequest
entities.description: Requests to email or convert a cost estimate into a detailed quote.

entities.name: BudgetRangeOption
entities.description: Predefined budget ranges for dropdowns (e.g., $500,000–$800,000).

entities.name: Inquiry
entities.description: Contact & inquiry submissions, including Design-Build project inquiries.

fields.name: budgetRangeOptionId
fields.description: Reference to a BudgetRangeOption if selected from dropdown.

fields.name: budget_range_label
fields.description: Captured label of selected budget range.
